metadata.title: Cody Meneley | Tattoo Artist
metadata.description: Premium tattoo craftsmanship by Cody Meneley. Tattooing since 2004, sponsored artist, with a black and grey specialty.

home.headline: Precision Tattooing with a Black and Grey Signature
home.subheadline: Cody Meneley delivers clean, professional tattoo work across all styles, with a specialized focus on black and grey realism and detail.
